scripts.prepages: cp index.vite.template.html index.html && cp listen.vite.template.html listen.html && cp music.vite.template.html music.html && cp collaborations.vite.template.html collaborations.html && cp services.vite.template.html services.html && cp live.vite.template.html live.html && cp contact.vite.template.html contact.html
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && npm run prepages && vite build && node scripts/generate-route-fallbacks.mjs
